race.comment: KOIOS (10) appreciated a big drop in the weights and a better draw when successful last start in soft conditions over 1200m at Kembla. Only goes up 1kg today and can keep improving at just the fourth run of the campaign. WHAT A RUSH (6) benefited from a five-week let-up when she led all the way for a decisive win over 1000m at Port Macquarie nine days ago. Grows a leg when there is plenty of give in the ground. Drops a massive 8kgs after Smyth's claim so she is sure to prove tough to catch again. PICK UP THE TAB (7) hasn't landed a blow in three runs this prep. Has raced once on a heavy track and scored at Kembla last prep. Takes a big dive in the weights today and might be the surprise packet. BABY RYAN (2) has revelled on the wet tracks of late. Has won three from six at or around this distance. Finds a suitable race and should give a good account again. BODHI BOY (1) is back from a 15-week spell. The winner of two from four when fresh so must be considered.
